articles.author: Michelle Starr
articles.title: Mysterious Collapse Reshaped Europe 5,000 Years Ago, Scientists Say - ScienceAlert
articles.description: The growth of the human population has not always been a smooth ride, but has been punctuated by some strange fluctuations.
articles.content: The growth of the human population has not always been a smooth ride, but has been punctuated by some strange fluctuations. At multiple points in our history, populations have dramatically imploded.… [+5344 chars]
